title: fix(deployer,cli): enable gzip compression for studio static assets
summary: Enables gzip compression for studio static assets to reduce transfer sizes (~70% reduction). In the deployer (production), adds Hono's compress() middleware with SSE exclusion. In the CLI dev server, pre-compresses the HTML shell with gzipSync at startup and serves it with proper Content-Encoding headers. Reduces the main JS bundle transfer from ~5.8 MB to ~1.7 MB, cutting blank-screen time from ~5.7s to ~1.7s.
maintainerNotes: Approved by wardpeet. abhiaiyer91 is still listed as a requested reviewer but approval threshold is met. CI is green (Observability test failure is unrelated to this PR; Memory/E2E tests pending). No merge conflicts. The changeset covers both @mastra/deployer and mastra (cli) as patch bumps. No automated tests added, but compression behavior is well-understood and the manual test plan is documented. Clean, focused change.
